summary: Verified all 4 iteration-8 changes for Pom Jar (customizable goal + persistence, celebration keeps jar visible with light backdrop, shelf beneath drawer & collapsible, shelf jar delete). All 8 UI test cases PASS including regression (complete adds pom, place-on-shelf resets to 0/<goal>).
critical_code_review_comments: App.js fill-effect deps are [poms.length] (per PRD to prevent celebration on typing goal). This means if user LOWERS goal below current poms.length, jarFull state won't retrigger celebration until poms.length changes again. Minor UX edge case; acceptable given PRD.
Shelf delete buttons use opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 — invisible on touch devices; works but not touch-accessible. Not a bug, worth a11y note.
Jar.computeGrid caps c<=30; for very large goals (>30 cols) rows may still overflow. Not tested; likely fine within intended goal range.
seed_data_creation: localStorage-seeded pomjar_goal/poms/shelf/tasks via page.evaluate in each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration-8 features verified against the live preview URL at 1440x900. Tests: (1) goal-input default 100, changes to 25, persists across reload. (2) 25 poms fill jar body (top gap 14px, avg pom width 54px, stratification: momentum bottom / joy top). (3) 100 poms fill (top gap 12px). (4) Celebration at goal=12 shows card + pj-jar-glow on jar-body + overlay bg rgba(0,0,0,0.2) + 12 pom spans still rendered behind card. (5) shelf.y > drawer.y+drawer.h. (6) shelf-toggle collapses 142->66px, reopens to 142px. (7) shelf-delete-{id} removes jar, persists after reload. (8) Place-on-shelf resets to '0 / 12 poms'. Note: seeding poms.length>=goal auto-triggers celebration on mount — clear localStorage between test groups to avoid overlay intercepts.
